criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on app stores (e.g., Google Play, Apple App Store).
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across platforms.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: Active Users
criteria.description: Monthly active users (MAU) or daily active users (DAU).

criteria.name: Content Library Size
criteria.description: The size and variety of the content library offered by the app.

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The level and effectiveness of AI integration in features like recommendations, personalization, and content discovery.
criteria.sources: Official app descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: The quality and intuitiveness of the user interface and overall user experience.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, app store descriptions

criteria.name: Subscription Cost
criteria.description: The cost of subscription plans and value for money.
criteria.sources: Official app websites, app store listings

criteria.name: Cross-Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability across different platforms and devices.
criteria.sources: Official app websites, app store listings
